steps.title: Recognize this as a dimensional analysis problem
steps.content:
To convert the price from dollars per ounce to dollars per cubic inch, we multiply the density in ounces per cubic inch by the price in dollars per ounce. The ounce units cancel:
$$(\text{ounces per in}^3) \times (\text{dollars per ounce}) = \text{dollars per in}^3$$

steps.title: Substitute and calculate
steps.content:
Given:
  • Density: $0.565$ ounces per cubic inch
  • Price: \$8.00 per ounce
Multiply:
$$(0.565) \times (8.00) = 4.52$$
The selling price is \$4.52 per cubic inch.
